title: Test-section boundary-form bakeoff
recommended_launch_policy: Compute-node local Fluid sweep; do not launch OpenFOAM; claim a new board row first
why_launch: Part3 omitting test-section heat improves probe RMSE but worsens mdot error by 0.00099 kg/s on average, so the test section is a real closure lever.
inputs: AGENT-360 Part2/Part3 tables; section_heat_balance.csv; Fluid configs
acceptance_signal: At least three setup forms scored: zero test-section, distributed sink, passive ambient UA; Salt2 fit if needed and Salt3/Salt4 scored without refit.
main_risk: Encoding the current negative source as physical truth instead of a compatibility representation
do_not_do: Do not refit on Salt3/Salt4; do not call realized CFD test heat predictive.

title: Setup-only cooler closure bakeoff
recommended_launch_policy: Compute-node local Fluid sweep; highest-value overnight candidate
why_launch: Current fixed-mdot Fluid cooler RMSE is 102.886 W while a Salt2-fit constant-UA diagnostic gets 4.638 W, so cooler closure dominates forward predictivity.
inputs: AGENT-360 Part4 tables; external-BC parity package; Fluid configs
acceptance_signal: A setup-only cooler model beats current fixed-mdot Fluid cooler on Salt3/Salt4 without using realized CFD cooler heat at runtime.
main_risk: Accidentally using CFD cooler heat as input
do_not_do: Do not include imposed_cfd_cooler_upper_bound in predictive ranking.

title: Reference temperature and sensor-state audit
why_launch: Full CFD heat ledger M1 still has average absolute Tmean error 161.566 K, so reference/start-state handling may dominate thermal probe error.
inputs: AGENT-360 M1/M1b tables; sensor_level_errors.csv; Fluid configs
acceptance_signal: Compare at least CFD Tmean, inlet TP, loop mean, and Fluid default start-temperature anchors; identify whether large offsets are state-reference or spatial-profile errors.
main_risk: Using validation sensor targets as runtime setup inputs
do_not_do: Do not use TP/TW values to tune a final predictive run.

title: Pressure-root solver quality and speed audit
recommended_launch_policy: Compute-node local Fluid sweep; can run alongside docs
why_launch: AGENT-360 full build takes minutes because pressure residual evaluations rebuild geometry; solver QA will make later overnight sweeps cheaper and more reproducible.
inputs: AGENT-360 builder; Fluid solve_case confirmation package; Fluid configs
acceptance_signal: Show fast-scan roots agree with solve_case within declared mdot/pressure tolerances or flag modes needing full solve_case.
main_risk: Changing Fluid source behavior while profiling
do_not_do: Do not edit external Fluid unless a row explicitly claims it.

title: Salt1 patch heat ledger backfill plan or extraction
recommended_launch_policy: Only launch if source cases and extraction scripts are confirmed; otherwise write extraction contract
why_launch: Salt1 is blocked from CFD heat-flux modes solely because the consumed patch heat ledger lacks a current Salt1 row.
inputs: Salt1 terminal BC packages; patch heat ledger tools; source case manifests
acceptance_signal: Produce a candidate Salt1 section heat ledger with sign conventions matching Salt2-4, explicitly marked diagnostic until admitted.
main_risk: Mutating native CFD outputs or mixing Salt1 perturbation status into nominal fit rows
do_not_do: Do not admit Salt1 fit use from this extraction alone.

title: Heater source-entry fraction follow-up
recommended_launch_policy: Do not duplicate active heater row; launch only after checking AGENT-370 status
why_launch: Electrical 1:1 heater RMSE is 24.629 W while Salt2-fit heater efficiency is 0.68 W; heater closure is tractable but may already be covered by a parallel row.
inputs: AGENT-360 Part5 tables; AGENT-370 outputs if complete; Fluid configs
acceptance_signal: Document whether a setup-only heater source fraction can be defended without realized CFD heater heat.
do_not_do: Do not start until the board says AGENT-370 is complete or a coordinator grants a non-overlap row.

title: Multi-objective mdot/probe residual map
recommended_launch_policy: Compute-node local Fluid sweep after ON-TS-BOUNDARY or ON-COOLER-SETUP
why_launch: mdot and probe RMSE are only weakly associated overall, so model selection needs a Pareto view rather than one scalar objective.
inputs: Outputs from ON-TS-BOUNDARY and ON-COOLER-SETUP; AGENT-360 correlation table
acceptance_signal: Identify forms that improve both mdot error and TP/TW RMSE on Salt3/Salt4 without refit.
do_not_do: Do not optimize directly on Salt4.
